notes: v0.28.1 — Trails actually look different (no more color-only): EMBER spark flicker · SPECTRUM hue-cycle · GLITCH cyan+magenta shards · SYNTH GRID dual-rail · DARK MATTER wisps + stars · SOUND WAVE sinusoidal curve · LIGHT RAYS halo stack · GOLD BURST cross-bands · 13 more.
